scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --workspace backend run dev" "npm --workspace frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.test:unit: npm --workspace backend run test && npm --workspace frontend run test
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:bdd && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: npm --workspace backend run lint && npm --workspace frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
